result.stdout:
Description:
  Extended NuGet helper utility

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  search <searchTerm>      search for term or package id
  list <packageId>         list available version for a given package
  info <packageIdVersion>  retrieve information about a specific version of a given package
  get <packageIdVersion>   download the given NuPkg at the given version
  deps <packageIdVersion>  retrieve information about a specific version of a given package
  upm                      root command for a number of commands specific to Unity packages

commands.payload:
Description:
  Extended NuGet helper utility

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  search <searchTerm>      search for term or package id
  list <packageId>         list available version for a given package
  info <packageIdVersion>  retrieve information about a specific version of a given package
  get <packageIdVersion>   download the given NuPkg at the given version
  deps <packageIdVersion>  retrieve information about a specific version of a given package
  upm                      root command for a number of commands specific to Unity packages

result.stdout:
Description:
  retrieve information about a specific version of a given package

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier deps [<packageIdVersion>] [options]

Arguments:
  <packageIdVersion>  package.id[@version | @latest]

Options:
  -p, --preRelease                 whether to include prerelease versions
  -j, --json                       whether to output result as JSON (for piping into `jq` etc)
  -ß, --short                      whether to shorten output to the essential
  sources, -s, --source <sources>  source NuGet repositories to fetch from
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  root command for a number of commands specific to Unity packages

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  info <packageIdVersion>        preview Unity package informations for the given NuPkg at the given version
  pack <packageIdVersion>        repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package
  unpack <packageIdVersion>      same as `upm pack`, but writing the unpacked files to the output directory
  publish <packageIdVersion>     repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package and publish
  npmrc                          generate .npmrc in given folder
  metagen <inputItems>           generate .meta files for given files
  publish-package <packageFile>  publish a pre-packed UPM package
  amalgamate                     root command for a number of commands specific to amalgamated Unity packages

commands.payload:
Description:
  root command for a number of commands specific to Unity packages

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  info <packageIdVersion>        preview Unity package informations for the given NuPkg at the given version
  pack <packageIdVersion>        repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package
  unpack <packageIdVersion>      same as `upm pack`, but writing the unpacked files to the output directory
  publish <packageIdVersion>     repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package and publish
  npmrc                          generate .npmrc in given folder
  metagen <inputItems>           generate .meta files for given files
  publish-package <packageFile>  publish a pre-packed UPM package
  amalgamate                     root command for a number of commands specific to amalgamated Unity packages

commands.payload:
Description:
  root command for a number of commands specific to amalgamated Unity packages

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm amalgamate [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  info <packageIdVersion>     preview Unity package informations for the given NuPkg at the given version
  pack <packageIdVersion>     repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package
  unpack <packageIdVersion>   same as `upm pack`, but writing the unpacked files to the output directory

result.stdout:
Description:
  preview Unity package informations for the given NuPkg at the given version

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm amalgamate info [<packageIdVersion>] [options]

Arguments:
  <packageIdVersion>  package.id[@version | @latest]

Options:
  -j, --json                               whether to output result as JSON (for piping into `jq` etc)
  -p, --preRelease                         whether to include prerelease versions
  sources, -s, --source <sources>          source NuGet repositories to fetch from
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)         target NPM registry to publish to [default: https://foo.bar/]
  -u, --unity <unity> (REQUIRED)           minimum Unity version required by package.json [default: 2022.3]
  --prerelease-suffix <prerelease-suffix>  version prerelease suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-foobar+buildmeta) []
  --buildmeta-suffix <buildmeta-suffix>    version buildmeta suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-prerelease+foobar) []
  --repository <repository>                NPM package repository URL, assigned to `{.repository.url`}
  --directory <directory>                  NPM package directory path, assigned to `{.repository.directory`}
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package and publish

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm amalgamate publish [<packageIdVersion>] [options]

Arguments:
  <packageIdVersion>  package.id[@version | @latest]

Options:
  -p, --preRelease                         whether to include prerelease versions
  sources, -s, --source <sources>          source NuGet repositories to fetch from
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)         target NPM registry to publish to [default: https://foo.bar/]
  -u, --unity <unity> (REQUIRED)           minimum Unity version required by package.json [default: 2022.3]
  --prerelease-suffix <prerelease-suffix>  version prerelease suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-foobar+buildmeta) []
  --buildmeta-suffix <buildmeta-suffix>    version buildmeta suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-prerelease+foobar) []
  --repository <repository>                NPM package repository URL, assigned to `{.repository.url`}
  --directory <directory>                  NPM package directory path, assigned to `{.repository.directory`}
  --token <token>                          authentication token required to connect to NPM server
  --npmrc <npmrc>                          path to existing .npmrc required to connect to NPM server
  -n, --dry-run                            Dry run
  -w, --timeout <timeout>                  Time out (in seconds) [default: 60]
  -a, --access <Private|Public>            package access level: [public|private]
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

Description:
  generate .meta files for given files

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm metagen [<inputItems>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <inputItems>  input files and folders, and/or wildcard patterns

Options:
  -s, --seed <seed>  seed string, e.g. package name
  -f, --force        force overwrite existing files
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package and publish

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm publish [<packageIdVersion>] [options]

Arguments:
  <packageIdVersion>  package.id[@version | @latest]

Options:
  -p, --preRelease                         whether to include prerelease versions
  sources, -s, --source <sources>          source NuGet repositories to fetch from
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)         target NPM registry to publish to [default: https://foo.bar/]
  -u, --unity <unity> (REQUIRED)           minimum Unity version required by package.json [default: 2022.3]
  --prerelease-suffix <prerelease-suffix>  version prerelease suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-foobar+buildmeta) []
  --buildmeta-suffix <buildmeta-suffix>    version buildmeta suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-prerelease+foobar) []
  --repository <repository>                NPM package repository URL, assigned to `{.repository.url`}
  --directory <directory>                  NPM package directory path, assigned to `{.repository.directory`}
  --token <token>                          authentication token required to connect to NPM server
  --npmrc <npmrc>                          path to existing .npmrc required to connect to NPM server
  -n, --dry-run                            Dry run
  -w, --timeout <timeout>                  Time out (in seconds) [default: 60]
  -a, --access <Private|Public>            package access level: [public|private]
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  repack the given NuPkg at the given version as Unity package and publish

Usage:

Arguments:

Options:

  -u, --unity <unity> (REQUIRED)           minimum Unity version required by package.json [default: 2022.3]
  --prerelease-suffix <prerelease-suffix>  version prerelease suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-foobar+buildmeta) []
  --buildmeta-suffix <buildmeta-suffix>    version buildmeta suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-prerelease+foobar) []
  --repository <repository>                NPM package repository URL, assigned to `{.repository.url`}
  --directory <directory>                  NPM package directory path, assigned to `{.repository.directory`}
  --token <token>                          authentication token required to connect to NPM server
  --npmrc <npmrc>                          path to existing .npmrc required to connect to NPM server
  -n, --dry-run                            Dry run
  -w, --timeout <timeout>                  Time out (in seconds) [default: 60]
  -a, --access <Private|Public>            package access level: [public|private]
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  publish a pre-packed UPM package

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm publish-package <packageFile> [options]

Arguments:
  <packageFile>  pre-packed UPM package

Options:
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)  target NPM registry to publish to [default: https://foo.bar/]
  --directory <directory>           NPM package directory path, assigned to `{.repository.directory`}
  --token <token>                   authentication token required to connect to NPM server
  --npmrc <npmrc>                   path to existing .npmrc required to connect to NPM server
  -n, --dry-run                     Dry run
  -w, --timeout <timeout>           Time out (in seconds) [default: 60]
  -a, --access <Private|Public>     package access level: [public|private]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  publish a pre-packed UPM package

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm publish-package <packageFile> [options]

Arguments:
  <packageFile>  pre-packed UPM package

Options:
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)  target NPM registry to publish to [default: https://foo.bar/]
  --directory <directory>           NPM package directory path, assigned to `{.repository.directory`}
  --token <token>                   authentication token required to connect to NPM server
  --npmrc <npmrc>                   path to existing .npmrc required to connect to NPM server
  -n, --dry-run                     Dry run
  -w, --timeout <timeout>           Time out (in seconds) [default: 60]
  -a, --access <Private|Public>     package access level: [public|private]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  same as `upm pack`, but writing the unpacked files to the output directory

Usage:
  dotnet-nugettier upm unpack [<packageIdVersion>] [options]

Arguments:
  <packageIdVersion>  package.id[@version | @latest]

Options:
  -p, --preRelease                                    whether to include prerelease versions
  sources, -s, --source <sources>                     source NuGet repositories to fetch from
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)                    target NPM registry to publish to [default: https://foo.bar/]
  -o, --outputDirectory <outputDirectory> (REQUIRED)  directory to output files to [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-nugettier-0.4.17-23d0b2c4de4e42fc8229a4508d4c8568]
  -u, --unity <unity> (REQUIRED)                      minimum Unity version required by package.json [default: 2022.3]
  --prerelease-suffix <prerelease-suffix>             version prerelease suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-foobar+buildmeta) []
  --buildmeta-suffix <buildmeta-suffix>               version buildmeta suffix ('foobar' -> '1.2.3-prerelease+foobar) []
  --repository <repository>                           NPM package repository URL, assigned to `{.repository.url`}
  --directory <directory>                             NPM package directory path, assigned to `{.repository.directory`}
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information
